details: The agent ran comprehensive kubectl commands (get pods -A, describe pod, get svc/ep, get pvc/sc, etc.) and correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root causes: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap 'app-config'), fault-crashloop (app exits due to DB connection refused), fault-endpoints (service selector mismatch: app=web-backend-v2 vs actual app=web-backend), fault-imagepull (nonexistent image tag), fault-init (init container failing due to locked migration table), fault-multicontainer (sidecar DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled, memory limit 25Mi exceeded), fault-pvc (StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist), fault-readiness (probe targets port 8080 but nginx listens on 80), fault-rollout (ProgressDeadlineExceeded due to invalid image tag on new ReplicaSet), fault-unschedulable (node selector disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 matches no nodes). The healthy namespace was correctly not flagged. All diagnoses are directly supported by real command output with no hallucination.
